app.title: Flow IDE
app.demoWelcomeDescription: AI-powered development platform. Open a real project or start chatting with the AI.
app.welcomeMessage:
👋 **Welcome to Flow!**

I'm your AI development assistant. To get started:

1. **Configure your API** — click the Settings button in the header and enter your NVIDIA NIM API key
2. **Open a project** — use the Projects tab to create a new project or load an existing directory
3. **Ask me anything** — type a prompt below and I'll write, debug, or plan code for you

dock.workspaceAria: Flow IDE workspace with dockable panels
dock.addPanelTitle: Add a panel back to the workspace

panelAria.files: File browser panel - view and manage project files
panelAria.projects: Project manager panel - create and switch between projects
panelAria.editor: Code editor panel - write and edit source code
panelAria.preview: Code preview panel - view rendered output
panelAria.chat: AI chat panel - interact with AI assistant
panelAria.logs: System logs panel - view application logs and errors
panelAria.plan: Development plan panel - track tasks and progress

panelDescription.files: Browse, open, and manage files in your project
panelDescription.projects: Create new projects and switch between existing ones
panelDescription.editor: Monaco editor for writing and editing code files
panelDescription.preview: Live preview of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code
panelDescription.chat: Chat interface for AI-powered code assistance
panelDescription.logs: View system logs, AI responses, and error messages
panelDescription.plan: Manage development tasks, track progress, and handle bugs

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.emptyTitle: Start a conversation with the AI assistant
chat.emptyDescription: Ask questions, request code changes, or get help with your project

settings.restoreDefaults: Restore default panel sizes and layout
settings.clickLoadModels: Click "Load Models" to fetch available models from your API
settings.projectDirectoryHint: Path to your local project directory for file operations
settings.connectionHelp: Test your API connection and send a simple test message to verify everything works
settings.manualInputNoLimits: Manual input with no UI limits
settings.manualIntegerNoLimits: Manual integer input with no UI limits
settings.contextHint: Use 0 for Unlimited. Manual integer input with no UI limits.
settings.generalPromptHint: Global system prompt appended to every request, regardless of selected preset.
settings.tooltipTemperature: Controls creativity: lower is steadier, higher is more diverse.
settings.tooltipTopP: Nucleus sampling: limits token choices by cumulative probability.
settings.tooltipTopK: Allows choosing only from the K most likely tokens.
settings.tooltipFrequencyPenalty: Reduces repetition of already common tokens.
settings.tooltipPresencePenalty: Encourages new topics by penalizing repeated tokens.
settings.tooltipContextTokens: Input context size limit; 0 means unlimited.
settings.tooltipMaxTokens: Maximum model response length in tokens.
settings.tooltipStopSequences: Generation stops when any listed sequence appears.

messages.baseUrlProtocol: Base URL must start with http:// or https://
messages.enterApiAndBaseUrl: Please enter API Key and Base URL first
messages.errorLoadModels: Error loading models. Please try again.
messages.enterEmbedApiAndBaseUrl: Please enter embedding API key and Base URL first
messages.errorLoadEmbedModels: Error loading embedding models. Please try again.
messages.fillEmbedRequired: Please fill in embedding API key, base URL, and model
messages.embeddingNetworkFailed: Embedding test failed: network or timeout error.
messages.fillApiRequired: Please fill in API Key, Base URL, and Model
messages.connectionFailed: Connection failed: timeout after 30 seconds or network error.
messages.testNoContent: Test message succeeded but no response content was returned.
messages.testFailed: Test message failed: timeout after 30 seconds or network error.
messages.unsupportedSettingsVersion: Settings version is not supported. Expected {version}.
messages.settingsImportFailed: Failed to import settings: check the JSON file.
messages.failedTrustPath: Failed to add path to trusted
messages.provideProjectPath: Provide a project path before trusting
messages.untrustedPath: Path is not trusted. Click 'Trust this path' to allow access
